name: Beijing Teamsun Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Beijing Teamsun Technology Co.,Ltd. provides enterprise IT products and consulting services. The company offers cloud data center; big data platform; Internet of Things applications; and server services. It serves telecommunication, postal, finance, government, tourism, education, manufacture, energy, transportation, military, and other fields. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.
